description: Posts that prominently display business operating hours with day-by-day breakdowns, using clear formatting and time stamps to inform customer visit planning.
structural_recipe: Lead with brand/product announcement, include prominent clock emoji (⏰), structure hours in bulleted format by day or day range, use 12-hour time format with A.M./P.M. notation, position hours section below main offer text, maintain bilingual accessibility (Arabic/English or Spanish/English), keep formatting clean and scannable.
why_it_works: Saudi consumers value operational transparency and planning ahead for visits. Clear posted hours reduce friction, build trust through punctuality emphasis, and align with Islamic prayer time considerations where customers appreciate knowing exact availability. Removes uncertainty and shows professional business management.
transplantation_caveats: Hours must account for prayer times (Zuhr, Asr, Maghrib) which may affect F&B footfall patterns
Weekend structure differs in Saudi Arabia (Friday-Saturday vs Western Mon-Sun); verify local workweek alignment
Ramadan hours typically differ significantly; pattern may need seasonal variation messaging
cultural_constraints: Hours should not conflict with prayer times without explanation
Use local Arabic day names alongside English for accessibility
Consider gender-segregated hours if applicable to venue type
